title: Scroll Boxes
description: Upon pickup, lose all [gold]Gold[/gold] and choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]2[/blue] packs of cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Each pack contains 2 Common cards and 1 Uncommon card from your character's card pool. Special case: Defect has a 1% chance for a pack of 3 Claw cards instead. Requires at least 4 Common and 2 Uncommon cards to be unlocked for generation.
